title: Crunchy Chinese Chicken Noodles
description: A keto-friendly Chinese dish featuring crunchy vegetables and soft sugar, perfect for a sick day, this recipe combines grassy and sweet flavors in a satisfying noodle dish.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced celery and grated carrots to the skillet and cook until they start to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the bean sprouts to the skillet and cook until they are tender-crisp, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the cooked chicken back into the skillet and stir in the light brown soft sugar, soy sauce, and sesame oil.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sugar has dissolved and the ingredients are well combined.
Cook the shirataki noodles according to the package instructions and drain well.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the chicken and vegetables.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
